app.name: Driving licence Practice app Japan
app.description: Driving licence Practice app Japan is a comprehensive mobile application designed to help users prepare for the Japanese driving license test. The app offers a variety of practice questions, mock tests, and study materials to enhance learning and improve test-taking skills.

app.name: JLPT N5
app.description: JLPT N5 is an app designed to help users prepare for the Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) at the N5 level. It offers a variety of study materials, including vocabulary lists, grammar explanations, practice questions, and mock tests to enhance learning and improve test-taking skills.

app.name: Gymmy - everything related to fitness
app.description: Gymmy is your ultimate fitness companion, designed to help you achieve your health and wellness goals with ease. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete, Gymmy offers a comprehensive suite of features to support your fitness journey.

app.name: NRNA Nagoya
app.description: App developed for NRNA Nagoya where latest updates about the organization is provided

app.name: Tiny Tools
app.description: Tiny Tools is your all-in-one digital Swiss Army Knife, consolidating essential utilities into a single, lightweight, and privacy-focused app. Seamlessly transfer files via serverless P2P sharing and utilize on-device AI for instant background removal and smart photo editing. Secure your communications with encrypted secret messaging and self-destructing notes while boosting productivity with integrated QR tools, OCR scanning, and PDF generation. It’s the ultimate toolkit for users who value power, privacy, and simplicity without the bloat.
